questions.meaning: 上气不接下气，喘不过气来
questions.context_sentence: Why are you out of breath? Have you been running?
questions.cn: 你为什么喘不过气来？你刚才一直在跑步吗？
questions.hint: 跑得太快，气(breath)都跑出去(out)了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Why are you ____? Have you been running?

questions.context_sentence: I've been working hard. Now I'm going to have a break.
questions.cn: 我一直在努力工作。现在我要休息一下。
questions.hint: break有“打断”的意思，打断工作就是休息。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I've been thinking about what you said and I've decided to take your advice.
questions.cn: 我一直在考虑你所说的，我决定采纳你的建议。
questions.hint: take是拿走，拿走别人的建议并使用它。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Chris hasn't been feeling well recently.
questions.cn: 克里斯最近感觉不太舒服。
questions.hint: recent(最近的) + ly(后缀) = 最近。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Laura has been travelling in South America for the last three months.
questions.cn: 劳拉在过去的三个月里一直在南美洲旅行。
questions.hint: South(南) + America(美洲)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Don't disturb me now. I'm working.
questions.cn: 现在不要打扰我。我正在工作。
questions.hint: dis(分开) + turb(搅动) -> 搅动思绪，即打扰。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Hurry up! We're waiting.
questions.cn: 快点！我们正在等呢。
questions.hint: hurry(赶紧) + up(向上/程度) -> 快快快。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Jane's little boy comes into the house with a very dirty face.
questions.cn: 简的小男孩走进屋子，脸脏兮兮的。
questions.hint: dirt(泥土) + y(形容词后缀) -> 像泥土一样的，即脏的。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Study this example situation.
questions.cn: 研究一下这个示例情况。
questions.hint: sit(坐/位子) + uation -> 处于某个位子的状态，即情况。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: We use the present perfect continuous for an activity that has recently stopped.
questions.cn: 我们使用现在完成进行时来表示最近停止的活动。
questions.hint: act(行动) + ivity -> 行动的表现，即活动。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We use the present perfect continuous for an ____ that has recently stopped.

questions.context_sentence: No, but the ground is wet.
questions.cn: 没有，但是地面是湿的。
questions.hint: 在地(ground)上跑(run)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I've been talking to Amanda and she agrees with me.
questions.cn: 我一直在和阿曼达谈话，她同意我的看法。
questions.hint: a + gree(一致) + with -> 和某人一致，即同意。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Silvia is a very good tennis player.
questions.cn: 西尔维娅是一位非常出色的网球运动员。
questions.hint: tennis(网球) + player(玩的人/运动员)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Silvia is a very good tennis ____.

questions.context_sentence: How long have you been learning English?
questions.cn: 你学英语学了多久了？
questions.hint: how(如何) + long(长的/久) -> 问多久。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: He is sitting on the grass panting and resting.
questions.cn: 他坐在草地上气喘吁吁地休息。
questions.hint: 跑累了像平底锅(pan)里的气泡一样喘气。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: 上气不接下气，喘不过气来
